1101.name: Bandit Footpad
1101.description: A scrawny thief with a rusty dagger and desperate eyes.

1102.name: Forest Wolf
1102.description: A grey wolf with yellow eyes. It circles warily.

1103.name: Skeleton Warrior
1103.description: Bones held together by dark magic. It raises a notched sword.

1104.name: Goblin Scout
1104.description: A green-skinned creature with a crude spear and a nasty grin.

1105.name: Dark Acolyte
1105.description: A hooded figure muttering forbidden incantations.

1106.name: Iron Golem
1106.description: A massive construct of rusted iron. Its eyes glow red.

1107.name: Shadow Knight
1107.description: A warrior in black plate armor. Darkness seeps from the joints.

1108.name: Dragon Whelp
1108.description: A young dragon the size of a horse. Smoke curls from its nostrils.

1109.name: Field Mouse
1109.description: A tiny brown mouse that scurries between the cobblestones. Harmless but annoying.

1110.name: Stray Cat
1110.description: A mangy tabby cat with one torn ear. It hisses at your approach.

1111.name: Feral Boar
1111.description: A bristle-backed boar with yellowed tusks. It paws the ground aggressively.

1112.name: Bandit Archer
1112.description: A rangy woman with a shortbow and a quiver of black-fletched arrows.

1113.name: Bandit Captain
1113.description: A scarred man in mismatched armor barking orders at his crew.

sayResponses.text: The kingdom has seen better days. Beware the deeper halls.
Dark things stir in the lower levels. Steel yourself.
The crown's agents post bounties at the tavern board.
The king hasn't been seen in months. Some say the throne room is sealed.

1114.name: Goblin Shaman
1114.description: A hunched goblin rattling a bone staff and chanting in a guttural tongue.

1115.name: Goblin Brute
1115.description: A massive goblin nearly the size of an orc. It drags a spiked club.

1116.name: Dire Wolf
1116.description: A wolf twice the normal size with frost on its muzzle and murder in its eyes.

1117.name: Timber Rattlesnake
1117.description: A thick-bodied snake coiled in the underbrush. Its rattle buzzes a warning.

1118.name: Giant Spider
1118.description: A spider the size of a dog with venom dripping from its fangs.

1119.name: Skeleton Archer
1119.description: A skeleton with a cracked longbow. It draws back a bone-tipped arrow.

1120.name: Skeleton Mage
1120.description: A robed skeleton clutching a staff that crackles with necrotic energy.

1121.name: Restless Spirit
1121.description: A translucent figure drifting through the ruins. Its wail chills the blood.

1122.name: Cursed Knight
1122.description: A knight in tarnished armor. The visor is rusted shut but something moves inside.

1123.name: Troll
1123.description: A hulking green-skinned brute that regenerates wounds before your eyes.

1124.name: Ogre
1124.description: A dim-witted giant in a loincloth swinging a tree trunk as a weapon.

1125.name: Harpy
1125.description: A shrieking bird-woman with talons like daggers. She dives from above.

1126.name: Minotaur
1126.description: A bull-headed warrior in bronze armor. The labyrinth is his domain.

1127.name: Wraith Lord
1127.description: An ancient spirit of terrible power. The air freezes in its presence.

1128.name: Lich Apprentice
1128.description: A skeletal mage surrounded by floating spell-tomes and crackling runes.

1129.name: Stone Gargoyle
1129.description: A statue that wasn't a statue. Its stone wings crack open as it lunges.

1130.name: Wandering Merchant
1130.description: A jovial halfling with an overloaded pack mule and a winning smile.

dialogue.text: Welcome friend! Care to browse my wares?
I've traveled every road in the Crown.

sayResponses.text: The sphere? Aye, I've heard the stories. Traders from the eastern pass say something tore through the wizard's tower a fortnight ago. Left a hole you could see the sky through. The wizard's been raving about it ever since. If you're looking for answers, he's your best bet — if he hasn't gone completely mad by now.

1131.name: Old Hermit
1131.description: A weathered man in patched robes leaning on a gnarled staff.

dialogue.text: The forest remembers what men forget.
Beware the barrows after dark.

sayResponses.text: I saw it. Years ago. It rolled through the Crown like it was searching for something. Left cracks in the cobblestones.
I can push you beyond what the regular trainers offer. But it'll cost you Quest Points.
Every zone has something hidden. Look for rooms that don't appear on any map. Sometimes you need to speak the right word.
The Crown was once a great kingdom. Now it's just bones and ghosts. But the bones remember.

1132.name: Crown Militia Guard
1132.description: A soldier in the livery of the Shattered Crown. Alert but not hostile.

dialogue.text: Move along citizen.
The roads aren't safe after dark.

sayResponses.text: The kingdom has seen better days. Beware the deeper halls.
Dark things stir in the lower levels. Steel yourself.
The crown's agents post bounties at the tavern board.
The king hasn't been seen in months. Some say the throne room is sealed.

1133.name: Scarred Veteran Grimjaw
1133.description: A hulking figure covered in old battle scars, chained to the wall by choice rather than force. An enormous axe rests against the stone beside them. Their eyes burn with barely contained fury.

dialogue.text: Defense is for cowards. Swing harder. Swing ANGRIER.

1134.name: Plague Rat
1134.description: A bloated rat with patchy fur and weeping sores. Disease incarnate.

1135.name: Carrion Crow
1135.description: A fat black bird pecking at something best not examined.

1136.name: Moss Golem
1136.description: A shambling mass of earth and moss. Mushrooms sprout from its shoulders.

1137.name: Barrow Wight
1137.description: A desiccated corpse in ancient finery. Gold coins spill from its eye sockets.

1138.name: Forest Troll
1138.description: A smaller troll covered in bark and lichen. It blends with the trees.

1139.name: Will-o-Wisp
1139.description: A dancing ball of pale light that leads travelers astray.

1140.name: Owlbear
1140.description: A terrifying hybrid of owl and bear. It hoots and roars simultaneously.

1201.name: Street Punk
1201.description: A wired-up ganger with chrome implants and a switchblade.

1202.name: Rogue Drone
1202.description: A malfunctioning delivery drone sparking with exposed wires.

1203.name: Corporate Security
1203.description: A guard in black tactical gear with a stun baton.

1204.name: Cyber Hound
1204.description: A mechanical dog with razor teeth and infrared eyes.

1205.name: Hacker Ghost
1205.description: A holographic projection of a dead netrunner. Still dangerous.

1206.name: Mech Enforcer
1206.description: A bipedal combat mech with twin autocannons.

1207.name: Synth Assassin
1207.description: An android built for killing. Its face is eerily human.

1208.name: Rogue AI Node
1208.description: A server rack pulsing with malevolent intelligence. Drones orbit it.

1209.name: Junk Rat
1209.description: A rat with a circuit board fused to its spine. Its eyes glow faintly blue.

1210.name: Stray Synth-Cat
1210.description: A robotic cat with torn synthetic fur. It sparks when it moves.

1211.name: Glitch Beetle
1211.description: A swarm of tiny metallic insects that eat through wiring.

1212.name: Neon Junkie
1212.description: A twitching addict with a crackling stun-knuckle and nothing to lose.

1213.name: Chrome Ganger
1213.description: A street soldier with a chrome arm and a sawed-off shotgun.

1214.name: Data Courier
1214.description: A nervous runner with encrypted data-chips and a holdout pistol.

1215.name: Corpo Intern
1215.description: A terrified office worker who pulled a taser from their desk drawer.

1216.name: Sentry Turret
1216.description: A ceiling-mounted auto-turret tracking movement with a red laser.

1217.name: Maintenance Bot
1217.description: A utility robot gone haywire. Its welding torch swings wildly.

1218.name: Netrunner Shade
1218.description: The digital ghost of a flatlined hacker. It attacks through your implants.

1219.name: Corporate Ninja
1219.description: A black-clad operative with a monofilament blade. Corpo wetwork.

1220.name: Armored Response Unit
1220.description: Three corpo soldiers in heavy tactical gear moving in formation.

1221.name: Cyber-Psycho
1221.description: A chrome-loaded maniac who lost their humanity to too many implants.

1222.name: Black ICE
1222.description: Hostile intrusion countermeasure. It manifests as crackling black lightning.

1223.name: Trash Compactor Bot
1223.description: A massive industrial robot repurposed for violence. It crushes.

1224.name: Neon District Vendor
1224.description: A cheerful woman selling street food from a hovering cart.

dialogue.text: Best synth-noodles in the Grid! Only five credits!
You look like you could use a meal.

sayResponses.text: Keep your firmware updated and watch for rogue subroutines.
The deeper network nodes are corrupted. Proceed with caution.
Check the job board on the main terminal.
The network's been unstable since the AI fragmented.

1225.name: Info Broker
1225.description: A thin man in mirrorshades who knows everyone's secrets.

dialogue.text: Information has a price. Everything has a price.
I hear things. I know things.

sayResponses.text: Saw something weird on the security feeds last month. A round object moving through the lower levels at impossible speed. Want the footage? It'll cost you.
The Sprawl never sleeps. Good for business, bad for your health. Watch the back alleys.
Stay out of the deep Sprawl unless you can handle power level 200+. The gangs down there don't negotiate.
Word on the wire is something big is moving through the zones. Leaving a trail of broken walls and confused guards.
I deal in information, not goods. But the Vendor down the street can help you with equipment.

1226.name: Street Doc
1226.description: A former corpo surgeon running a back-alley clinic.

dialogue.text: I can patch you up but it won't be pretty.
No questions asked. That's the deal.

sayResponses.heal: Chrome rejection, bullet wounds, neural burnout. I've seen it all. Sit down.
sayResponses.chrome: I can install basic implants. Nothing fancy, but it won't kill you. Probably.
sayResponses.rumors: Something's been frying people's neural links in sector 7. Avoid that area.
sayResponses.cost: Fifty gold for patching. Hundred for implant work. Thousand for the experimental stuff.

1227.name: Grid Patrol Officer
1227.description: A tired cop in light armor doing their best in a broken system.

dialogue.text: Keep your nose clean.
I've got enough paperwork already.

sayResponses.text: We've had reports of structural damage consistent with a high-velocity spherical object. Case is still open.
Stay on the main grid paths. The alleys are unpatrolled and the gangs know it.
If you see anything suspicious, report it. We're stretched thin as it is.

1228.name: Viral Adware Sprite
1228.description: A tiny holographic mascot that attacks with pop-up ads and malware.

1229.name: Overclocked Courier Drone
1229.description: A delivery drone hacked to kamikaze speed. It rams anything in its path.

1230.name: EMP Spider
1230.description: A palm-sized robot that latches on and fries electronics.

1231.name: Corpo Security Chief
1231.description: A scarred veteran in a custom exo-suit. She's seen everything.

1301.name: Alley Mugger
1301.description: A desperate man with a snub-nose revolver and shaking hands.

1302.name: Corrupt Cop
1302.description: A detective with dead eyes and a badge that means nothing.

1303.name: Hired Muscle
1303.description: A massive enforcer in a cheap suit. Knuckles like walnuts.

1304.name: Cat Burglar
1304.description: A lithe figure in black. You almost didn't see them.

1305.name: Mob Lieutenant
1305.description: A sharp-dressed man with cold eyes and a silenced pistol.

1306.name: Femme Fatale
1306.description: Beautiful and deadly. The knife is already in her hand.

1307.name: Ghost of the Drowned
1307.description: A waterlogged specter that haunts the rain-slicked docks.

1308.name: The Fixer
1308.description: A shadowy broker who deals in secrets and violence.

sayResponses.text: Something round, you say? Yeah, I heard about that. Punched a hole through a wall on Bleecker Street last week. Cops wrote it up as a gas explosion, but I know a guy who saw it. Said it was small, round, and moving like a bullet — except bullets don't curve around corners and go UP through ceilings. Whatever it is, somebody wants it bad.

1309.name: Dock Rat
1309.description: A fat wharf rat the size of a terrier. It gnaws on something unidentifiable.

1310.name: Feral Alley Cat
1310.description: A one-eyed tom with scars and an attitude. It yowls in the dark.

1311.name: Pickpocket Kid
1311.description: A scrawny child with quick hands and quicker feet.

1312.name: Drunk Sailor
1312.description: A staggering man reeking of cheap whiskey. He swings a bottle.

1313.name: Loan Shark's Thug
1313.description: A thick-necked man with brass knuckles and a debt to collect.

1314.name: Crooked Bookie
1314.description: A sweating man with a ledger full of lies and a derringer.

1315.name: Opium Den Guard
1315.description: A drowsy but dangerous man with a curved knife and glazed eyes.

sayResponses.text: Trust nobody down here. Everyone's got an angle.
The deeper tunnels? People go in. They don't come back.
Talk to the bartender. He hears things.
The syndicates run everything below street level.

1316.name: Smuggler
1316.description: A wiry woman in a peacoat with contraband sewn into the lining.

1317.name: Dock Worker Ghost
1317.description: The spirit of a longshoreman crushed by falling cargo. Still working.

1318.name: Speakeasy Bouncer
1318.description: A mountain of a man in a too-tight vest. He cracks his knuckles.

1319.name: Jazz Club Singer
1319.description: A woman in a red dress with a voice like honey and eyes like razors.

dialogue.text: Buy a girl a drink?
The night is young and full of trouble.

sayResponses.music: I sing the blues because the city gives me plenty of material.
sayResponses.club: This place has been here since prohibition. The walls have stories.
sayResponses.rumors: The Syndicate boss comes here on Fridays. Always sits in the back. Never tips.
sayResponses.marble: I wrote a song about it. 'The Rolling Stone.' Nobody gets the reference.

1320.name: Private Eye
1320.description: A rumpled man in a trench coat nursing a bourbon. He watches everything.

dialogue.text: I'm working a case. Can't talk about it.
Everyone's got secrets in this town.

sayResponses.case: I'm between cases right now. Got something that needs investigating?
sayResponses.hire: My rates are reasonable. Results guaranteed. Methods... flexible.
sayResponses.syndicate: The Syndicate runs half this city. The other half just doesn't know it yet.
sayResponses.marble: A client mentioned something like that. Trail went cold at the docks.

1321.name: Newspaper Boy
1321.description: A kid hawking papers on the corner. He knows every rumor in town.

dialogue.text: Extra! Extra! Read all about it!
I hear things mister. For a price.

sayResponses.news: Extra! Extra! Read all about it! Strange disturbances reported citywide!
sayResponses.paper: Two gold for today's edition. All the news that's fit to print. And some that isn't.
sayResponses.rumors: The morning edition had a story about something smashing through the warehouse district.
sayResponses.help: I know every street in this city. Need directions? Ask away.

1322.name: Bartender
1322.description: A stone-faced man polishing a glass. He's heard every story twice.

dialogue.text: What'll it be?
I don't want no trouble in my establishment.

sayResponses.text: Trust nobody down here. Everyone's got an angle.
The deeper tunnels? People go in. They don't come back.
Talk to the bartender. He hears things.
The syndicates run everything below street level.

1323.name: Torch Singer's Bodyguard
1323.description: A silent woman with a shoulder holster and dead eyes.

1324.name: Triad Enforcer
1324.description: A tattooed man with a hatchet and a code of honor that doesn't include you.

1325.name: Dirty Politician
1325.description: A sweating man in a fine suit. He reaches for a hidden gun.

1326.name: Phantom Cabbie
1326.description: A ghostly taxi that runs you down in the fog. The meter's still running.

1327.name: Sewer Gator
1327.description: A massive albino alligator that lurks in the storm drains.

1328.name: Rain Wraith
1328.description: A figure made of falling rain. It dissolves and reforms endlessly.

1329.name: Mob Boss's Double
1329.description: A body double for someone important. Armed and expendable.

1330.name: Dockside Fence
1330.description: A hunched woman who buys and sells stolen goods from a boat.

dialogue.text: I don't ask where it came from and you don't ask where it goes.

sayResponses.buy: I don't sell. I acquire. There's a difference. Legally.
sayResponses.sell: Bring me anything interesting. I know people who want things.
sayResponses.docks: The docks are my territory. Nothing moves through here without my knowledge.
sayResponses.rumors: A crate washed up last week. Something inside it had already broken out. Round hole in the side.

1401.name: Feral Dog Pack
1401.description: A pack of starving dogs with madness in their eyes.

1402.name: Raider Scout
1402.description: A wasteland scavenger in patchwork armor.

1403.name: Militia Grunt
1403.description: A poorly trained soldier with more bravery than skill.

1404.name: Landmine Drone
1404.description: A small crawling robot that beeps ominously.

1405.name: Sniper Ghillie
1405.description: A nearly invisible marksman. You only see the muzzle flash.

1406.name: Tank Wraith
1406.description: The ghost of a destroyed tank. Its cannon still fires.

1407.name: Warlord's Champion
1407.description: A scarred veteran in salvaged power armor.

1408.name: Siege Mech
1408.description: A towering war machine bristling with weapons.

1409.name: Carrion Vulture
1409.description: A huge bald bird circling overhead. It's patient.

1410.name: Irradiated Coyote
1410.description: A mangy coyote with glowing patches on its hide. It moves wrong.

1411.name: Scrap Beetle
1411.description: A metallic beetle the size of a fist that feeds on ammunition casings.

1412.name: Wasteland Drifter
1412.description: A gaunt figure in rags shambling through the dust. Not quite alive.

1413.name: Raider Berserker
1413.description: A screaming lunatic in spiked armor charging with a fire axe.

1414.name: Raider Gunner
1414.description: A raider with a jury-rigged machine gun mounted on a shopping cart.

1415.name: Militia Sergeant
1415.description: A grizzled NCO with a battered rifle and a thousand-yard stare.

1416.name: Militia Medic
1416.description: A field medic with a red cross armband and a combat shotgun.

1417.name: Minefield Specter
1417.description: The ghost of a soldier who stepped on his own mine. He warns too late.

1418.name: Scorched Crawler
1418.description: A burned humanoid that drags itself through the ash. It was something once.

1419.name: War Dog
1419.description: A trained attack dog in a kevlar vest. It responds to whistle commands.

1420.name: Armored Personnel Carrier
1420.description: An autonomous APC with a mounted turret. Its AI is degraded.

1421.name: Flamethrower Trooper
1421.description: A soldier in a heat-resistant suit with a backpack fuel tank.

1422.name: Chemical Zombie
1422.description: A soldier exposed to nerve agent. Still walking. Still armed.

1423.name: Drone Swarm
1423.description: A cloud of micro-drones that strip flesh from bone in seconds.

1424.name: Artillery Ghost
1424.description: The spectral crew of a destroyed howitzer. They fire phantom shells.

1425.name: Field Commander
1425.description: A decorated officer with a sidearm and tactical genius.

sayResponses.text: The impact site? That's in the restricted zone. Command says it was an unexploded ordnance, but I've seen UXO and that ain't it. The crater's too clean, too perfect. And the radiation signature doesn't match anything in our database. Whatever hit that field came from somewhere else. Somewhere... outside.

1426.name: Quartermaster
1426.description: A gruff supply sergeant behind a cage of military surplus.

dialogue.text: You need it I probably got it. For a price.
Everything's rationed. Don't ask for extras.

sayResponses.text: Look, I don't know what hit Firebase Delta, and I don't want to know. All I know is we lost three walls, two generators, and a latrine to something that wasn't on any radar. If you're investigating, be my guest. But don't bring whatever it was back here.

1427.name: Combat Medic
1427.description: A weary medic with bloodstained hands and a kind voice.

dialogue.text: Hold still. This'll sting.
I've patched up worse. You'll live.

sayResponses.heal: Hold still. This'll sting. Actually, it'll hurt a lot. Hold still anyway.
sayResponses.war: Three tours. Seen things that'd turn your hair white. Still here though.
sayResponses.wounded: We're losing more people to whatever's in the eastern sector than to the enemy.
sayResponses.marble: A private in my unit described something. Round, fast, unstoppable. I thought he was shell-shocked.

1428.name: War Correspondent
1428.description: A civilian with a camera and more courage than sense.

dialogue.text: The people need to see what's happening here.
Don't mind me. Just documenting.

sayResponses.story: I'm documenting everything. Someone needs to tell the truth about what's happening here.
sayResponses.war: This isn't just a war. Something else is going on. Something the brass won't talk about.
sayResponses.rumors: My sources say the enemy isn't fighting us. They're running from something.
sayResponses.marble: I have photographs. Something round, moving at impossible speed. My editor won't publish them.

1429.name: Refugee
1429.description: A hollow-eyed civilian clutching a bundle of possessions.

dialogue.text: Have you seen my family?
Is it safe ahead?

sayResponses.home: Our village is gone. Destroyed in a single night. Not by soldiers.
sayResponses.help: We need food, water, medicine. Anything you can spare.
sayResponses.south: Don't go south. There's nothing left. Just craters and silence.
sayResponses.marble: The children saw it first. A ball of light, rolling through the fields. Then everything was gone.

1430.name: Munitions Rat
1430.description: A rat nesting in an ammo crate. It chews on primer caps.

1431.name: Rust Scorpion
1431.description: A scorpion the size of a cat living in a burned-out vehicle.

1501.name: Void Wisp
1501.description: A drifting mote of anti-light that drains warmth.

1502.name: Crystal Elemental
1502.description: A being of living crystal that refracts reality.

1503.name: Astral Predator
1503.description: A translucent creature that swims through empty space.

1504.name: Echo Fragment
1504.description: A piece of someone's memory given hostile form.

1505.name: Gravity Anomaly
1505.description: A sphere of compressed spacetime. It pulls everything inward.

1506.name: Star Wraith
1506.description: A being of compressed stellar energy. Blindingly bright.

1507.name: Void Leviathan
1507.description: A massive creature that drifts between the shards.

1508.name: Reality Fracture
1508.description: A tear in spacetime that lashes out at anything nearby.

1509.name: Dust Mote
1509.description: A tiny particle of cosmic debris that drifts aimlessly. Barely a threat.

1510.name: Starlight Moth
1510.description: A luminous insect with wings of condensed light. Beautiful and fragile.

1511.name: Nebula Jellyfish
1511.description: A translucent creature trailing bioluminescent tendrils through the void.

1512.name: Comet Shard
1512.description: A chunk of ice and rock hurtling through space with a mind of its own.

1513.name: Phase Spider
1513.description: A spider that blinks in and out of reality. Hard to hit.

1514.name: Stellar Parasite
1514.description: A worm-like creature that feeds on starlight and radiates cold.

1515.name: Gravity Sprite
1515.description: A playful entity that reverses local gravity for fun. Yours.

1516.name: Void Stalker
1516.description: A predator perfectly adapted to the emptiness. You see only its teeth.

1517.name: Temporal Moth
1517.description: A moth whose wings show scenes from other times. Its dust causes vertigo.

1518.name: Crystallized Memory
1518.description: A frozen moment from someone's life given solid form. It attacks with regret.

1519.name: Entropy Worm
1519.description: A creature that accelerates decay in everything it touches.

1520.name: Cosmic Ray
1520.description: A beam of pure energy that has achieved sentience and malice.

1521.name: Shard Guardian
1521.description: A crystalline construct tasked with protecting a floating island.

sayResponses.text: Reality is... flexible here. Don't trust your eyes.
The void whispers. Don't listen too long.
The beacons need tending. Always.
Something vast moves between the stars. Best not to dwell on it.

1522.name: Nebula Titan
1522.description: A colossal figure made of gas and dust. Stars burn in its chest.

1523.name: The Cartographer
1523.description: An ancient being that maps the drift. It trades in coordinates.

dialogue.text: I have charted every shard in this sector.
The void between is not empty. It watches.

sayResponses.text: Ah, you've noticed the gravitational scar. Yes, something passed through this region of space recently — something with mass that shouldn't exist at that scale. My charts show its trajectory bending through three dimensions... no, four. It's not just moving through space. It's moving through something else as well. I've been trying to plot its course, but the math keeps breaking.

1524.name: Drift Hermit
1524.description: A human who chose to live alone on a floating rock. Surprisingly sane.

dialogue.text: Quiet out here. I like quiet.
The crystals sing if you listen.

sayResponses.text: Reality is... flexible here. Don't trust your eyes.
The void whispers. Don't listen too long.
The beacons need tending. Always.
Something vast moves between the stars. Best not to dwell on it.

1525.name: Astral Merchant
1525.description: A four-armed being selling exotic goods from a hovering bazaar.

dialogue.text: Wares from a thousand realities! Browse freely!
This? From a dimension where gravity is optional.

sayResponses.text: Reality is... flexible here. Don't trust your eyes.
The void whispers. Don't listen too long.
The beacons need tending. Always.
Something vast moves between the stars. Best not to dwell on it.

1601.name: Gladiator Slave
1601.description: A desperate fighter with nothing left to lose.

1602.name: Roman Legionnaire
1602.description: A disciplined soldier in bronze armor with a gladius.

1603.name: Egyptian Guardian
1603.description: A jackal-headed warrior wielding a khopesh.

sayResponses.text: Time flows strangely here. Don't be alarmed if things repeat.
Paradoxes are... unpleasant. Avoid your other selves.
The chronometers need calibrating. Always drifting.
Past and future bleed together here. It's unsettling.

1604.name: Samurai Ronin
1604.description: A masterless warrior seeking death with honor.

1605.name: Viking Berserker
1605.description: A frothing warrior who feels no pain.

1606.name: Aztec Jaguar Warrior
1606.description: A fierce warrior in a jaguar pelt with an obsidian blade.

1607.name: Pharaoh's Mummy
1607.description: Ancient royalty wrapped in enchanted bandages.

1608.name: Time Paradox
1608.description: A glitching entity that exists in multiple moments simultaneously.

1609.name: Cave Rat
1609.description: A prehistoric rat the size of a small dog. Primitive and vicious.

1610.name: Feral Pigeon
1610.description: A pigeon from some era. It pecks aggressively at anything shiny.

1611.name: Sand Scarab
1611.description: A golden beetle the size of a fist that burrows through sand and flesh.

1612.name: Gladiator Retiarius
1612.description: A net-and-trident fighter with a cruel smile and quick reflexes.

1613.name: Gladiator Murmillo
1613.description: A heavily armored gladiator with a tower shield and short sword.

1614.name: Roman Centurion
1614.description: An officer in a red-crested helmet commanding with iron authority.

1615.name: Egyptian Priest
1615.description: A shaven-headed priest chanting protection spells over sacred ground.

sayResponses.text: Time flows strangely here. Don't be alarmed if things repeat.
Paradoxes are... unpleasant. Avoid your other selves.
The chronometers need calibrating. Always drifting.
Past and future bleed together here. It's unsettling.

1616.name: Anubis Jackal
1616.description: A supernatural jackal with golden eyes that guards the dead.

1617.name: Ninja
1617.description: A shadow-clad warrior who attacks from concealment with shuriken.

1618.name: Ashigaru Spearman
1618.description: A common foot soldier with a long spear and wicker armor.

1619.name: Viking Shieldmaiden
1619.description: A fierce woman with a round shield and a hand axe. She sings as she fights.

1620.name: Viking Skald
1620.description: A warrior-poet whose battle songs strengthen allies and weaken foes.

1621.name: Aztec Eagle Warrior
1621.description: An elite soldier in feathered armor with a macuahuitl edged in obsidian.

1622.name: Terracotta Soldier
1622.description: A clay warrior that animates when intruders approach. It does not tire.

1623.name: Mongol Horse Archer
1623.description: A mounted warrior firing arrows at a full gallop. Nearly impossible to catch.

1624.name: Greek Hoplite
1624.description: A bronze-armored soldier with a long spear and aspis shield.

1625.name: Spartan Champion
1625.description: An elite warrior who has trained since childhood for war.

1626.name: Pirate Captain
1626.description: A swaggering buccaneer with a cutlass and a flintlock pistol.

sayResponses.text: Time flows strangely here. Don't be alarmed if things repeat.
Paradoxes are... unpleasant. Avoid your other selves.
The chronometers need calibrating. Always drifting.
Past and future bleed together here. It's unsettling.

1627.name: Clockwork Soldier
1627.description: A mechanical warrior from a future that never was. Gears whir inside.

1628.name: Temporal Guardian
1628.description: A being tasked with protecting the timestream. You are a violation.

sayResponses.text: Time flows strangely here. Don't be alarmed if things repeat.
Paradoxes are... unpleasant. Avoid your other selves.
The chronometers need calibrating. Always drifting.
Past and future bleed together here. It's unsettling.

1629.name: Chrono-Beast
1629.description: A creature unstuck in time. It ages and de-ages as it fights.

1630.name: Era Merchant
1630.description: A time-displaced trader selling goods from every century.

dialogue.text: Silk from the Tang Dynasty! Spices from the Age of Sail!
Time is money friend. Literally in my case.

sayResponses.text: Time flows strangely here. Don't be alarmed if things repeat.
Paradoxes are... unpleasant. Avoid your other selves.
The chronometers need calibrating. Always drifting.
Past and future bleed together here. It's unsettling.

1631.name: Temporal Scholar
1631.description: A confused academic studying the frozen moments of history.

dialogue.text: Fascinating! This epoch shouldn't exist!
The temporal mechanics here are extraordinary.

sayResponses.text: Time flows strangely here. Don't be alarmed if things repeat.
Paradoxes are... unpleasant. Avoid your other selves.
The chronometers need calibrating. Always drifting.
Past and future bleed together here. It's unsettling.

1632.name: Gladiator Trainer
1632.description: A retired fighter covered in scars who trains the next generation.

dialogue.text: You fight like a child. Again!
Strength without technique is just flailing.

sayResponses.text: In the arena, we once had a contestant bring a strange sphere. It rolled through the gates and crushed three fighters before vanishing.
I train warriors. Bring me Quest Points and I'll push your body beyond its limits.
The arena tests your mettle. Only the strong survive here. Come ready or don't come at all.
Time moves strangely in this zone. Sometimes I remember training you before you've even arrived.

1701.name: Sewer Rat Swarm
1701.description: Hundreds of rats moving as one hungry mass.

1702.name: Tunnel Crawler
1702.description: A pale humanoid that has lived too long in the dark.

1703.name: Fungal Shambler
1703.description: A mass of toxic mushrooms given ambulatory form.

1704.name: Pipe Wraith
1704.description: A ghost trapped in the water system. It screams through the pipes.

1705.name: Undercity Boss
1705.description: A massive mutant who rules a section of tunnel.

1706.name: The Collector
1706.description: A thing that hoards everything — bones and trinkets and screams.

1707.name: Sewer Roach
1707.description: A cockroach the size of your hand. It skitters across the wet stone.

1708.name: Drain Slug
1708.description: A fat grey slug leaving a trail of corrosive slime.

1709.name: Blind Fish
1709.description: A pale eyeless fish that has grown legs and teeth.

1710.name: Undercity Pawnbroker
1710.description: A hunched figure behind a cage of rusted bars, appraising items with a jeweler's loupe.

dialogue.greeting: Got something to sell? Or looking to buy? I've got... things.

sayResponses.buy: Everything here has a history. Most of those histories involve theft. You want it or not?
sayResponses.sell: I'll take anything that isn't cursed. Had a bad experience with cursed items.
sayResponses.undercity: Down here, we make our own rules. Surface laws don't apply.
sayResponses.rumors: Something collapsed tunnel seven last week. Perfectly round hole. Nobody goes near it now.

1711.name: Gutter Snake
1711.description: A long thin snake adapted to the pipes. It drops from above.

1712.name: Tunnel Spider
1712.description: A pale spider with translucent skin. You can see its organs pulse.

1713.name: Sewer Gator
1713.description: An albino alligator that has grown enormous in the dark.

1714.name: Mushroom Man
1714.description: A humanoid fungus that communicates through spore clouds.

1715.name: Escaped Experiment
1715.description: Something that crawled out of a lab drain. It has too many limbs.

1716.name: Undercity Scavenger
1716.description: A human who lives in the tunnels. Territorial and desperate.

1717.name: Plague Doctor
1717.description: A masked figure in a long coat administering dubious cures.

1718.name: Bone Collector
1718.description: A hunched figure that builds sculptures from the bones of the dead.

1719.name: The Drip
1719.description: A sentient mass of sewage and industrial waste. It absorbs what it touches.

1720.name: Tunnel Hermit
1720.description: A gaunt figure wrapped in shadow, barely visible even in direct light. Their hands move in constant, fluid patterns  -  practicing strikes against targets only they can see.

dialogue.text: The shadow is not where you hide. It is where you strike from.

sayResponses.text: Keep your voice down. Walls have ears here.
Cross the wrong people and you'll vanish. Quietly.
Jobs are posted in code. Learn the cipher.
Everything's for sale here. Everything.

1721.name: Whisper
1721.description: You almost didn't see them. A figure in the darkest corner, wrapped in cloth so black it seems to absorb light. Only their eyes are visible  -  and they're watching you.

dialogue.text: You saw me. That means I let you. Remember that.

1801.name: Training Dummy
1801.description: A reinforced practice target. It doesn't fight back.

1802.name: Sparring Partner
1802.description: A skilled fighter who pulls their punches. Barely.

1803.name: Gravity Construct
1803.description: A training golem that gets heavier the longer you fight it.

1804.name: Mirror Self
1804.description: An exact copy of you. It knows every move you'll make.

1805.name: Wooden Striking Post
1805.description: A simple wooden post with target rings painted on it.

1806.name: Speed Bag Golem
1806.description: A small fast-moving construct that tests reflexes.

1807.name: Iron Sparring Golem
1807.description: A heavy metal construct that hits hard and takes punishment.

1808.name: Elemental Training Orb
1808.description: A floating orb that cycles through fire ice and lightning attacks.

1809.name: Shadow Clone
1809.description: A dark copy of you that fights with your weaknesses exposed.

1810.name: Endurance Pillar
1810.description: A construct that never attacks but gets harder to damage over time.

1811.name: Training Master
1811.description: A weathered instructor who evaluates your form and technique.

dialogue.text: Your stance is sloppy. Widen your feet.
Again. Faster this time.

sayResponses.text: The monks speak of a sphere that passed through the monastery garden. It left a perfect circle of dead grass that never grew back.
I teach all four disciplines: Vigor, Precision, Grit, and Instinct. Bring Quest Points and dedication.
Focus is the bridge between body and mind. The Meditation Guide can help you expand your reserves.
We preserve the old ways. Combat as art, not brutality. Though sometimes brutality is necessary.

1812.name: Meditation Guide
1812.description: A serene figure in white robes who teaches focus techniques.

dialogue.text: Breathe. Center yourself.
The mind is the sharpest weapon.

sayResponses.text: I felt it pass. A disturbance in the flow of energy. Something ancient and hungry.
Your Focus pool grows with Instinct and Vigor. I can help sharpen your Instinct through training.
I specialize in Instinct and Precision. The subtle arts. Bring Quest Points when you're ready.
The Void at the edge of everything... something waits there. I can feel it pulling.

1901.name: Lost Soul
1901.description: A confused spirit wandering the afterlife paths.

1902.name: Spirit Guardian
1902.description: A warrior who chose to guard the paths between life and death.

sayResponses.text: The old ones left warnings carved in stone. Heed them.
The deeper chambers hold things that should stay buried.
The relics call to those who seek them.
This place is older than memory. Older than names.

1903.name: Oni Gatekeeper
1903.description: A massive horned demon that guards a checkpoint.

1904.name: Reaper Initiate
1904.description: A young death god still learning the trade.

1905.name: The Forgotten King
1905.description: A spirit so old even death has forgotten his name.

1906.name: Soul Moth
1906.description: A tiny luminous insect that feeds on spiritual energy.

1907.name: Wandering Shade
1907.description: A formless shadow drifting without purpose or memory.

1908.name: Hungry Ghost
1908.description: A spirit consumed by a single desire it can never fulfill.

1909.name: Spirit Fox
1909.description: A ghostly fox with multiple tails. Mischievous but dangerous.

1910.name: Ancestral Warrior
1910.description: The spirit of a great fighter who trains eternally in death.

1911.name: Demon Foot Soldier
1911.description: A minor demon with red skin and a barbed spear.

1912.name: Celestial Soldier
1912.description: An armored spirit serving the judges of the dead.

1913.name: Soul Eater
1913.description: A bloated spirit that consumes other ghosts to grow stronger.

1914.name: Infernal Hound
1914.description: A three-headed dog made of black fire that guards the deeper paths.

1915.name: Wrathful Ancestor
1915.description: A spirit twisted by rage who attacks the living on sight.

1916.name: Bone Serpent
1916.description: A massive snake made of interlocking bones that slithers through the spirit realm.

1917.name: Judge's Scribe
1917.description: A spectral bureaucrat who records the deeds of the dead.

dialogue.text: Your name is not yet in my ledger.
All are judged. All are weighed.

sayResponses.judgment: I record every soul's deeds. Every kindness. Every cruelty. The ledger never lies.
sayResponses.records: Billions of entries. Each one a life. Each one matters.
sayResponses.afterlife: The worthy pass to the halls of rest. The unworthy... well. Best not to dwell on it.
sayResponses.marble: I have no entry for the Sphere. It has no soul. It has no deeds. It simply... is.

1918.name: Afterlife Ferryman
1918.description: A hooded figure with a long pole who transports souls across the river.

dialogue.text: The crossing costs a memory. Choose wisely.
I have ferried kings and beggars alike.

sayResponses.passage: One gold for the crossing. No gold, no crossing. Simple as that.
sayResponses.river: The river separates the living world from the dead. I am the bridge between them.
sayResponses.return: Some souls try to swim back. The current always takes them. Always.
sayResponses.marble: It crossed my river without a boat. Without payment. I could not stop it. Nothing can.

1919.name: Spirit Healer
1919.description: A gentle ghost who mends the wounds of the recently deceased.

dialogue.text: You are not dead yet. Interesting.
Rest here. Even spirits need rest.

sayResponses.text: The spirits whisper of it. A sphere that devours power. It has been rolling since before memory.
I can train you beyond mortal limits. The spirits guide my hand. Bring Quest Points.
The dead see more than the living. They watch the marble's path and tremble.
Rest here. The spirits will mend what is broken. But some wounds only time can heal.
The marble seeks power. Every zone it passes through, it grows stronger. You must find it before it finds everything.

101.name: Straw Dummy
101.description: A crude training dummy stuffed with straw. It doesn't fight back much.

102.name: Tower Rat
102.description: A large grey rat with beady red eyes. It hisses at your approach.

103.name: Cave Spider
103.description: A palm-sized spider with venomous-looking fangs.

105.name: Feral Hound
105.description: A scarred dog gone wild. It bares its teeth and circles you.

107.name: Skeleton Sentry
107.description: A reanimated skeleton clutching a rusted sword. It moves with jerky purpose.

108.name: Goblin Archer
108.description: A small green creature perched on a ledge, bow drawn.

110.name: Tower Guardian
110.description: A stone golem animated by faint magic. It blocks the stairs upward.

sayResponses.text: Take your time exploring. There's no rush here.
Stick to the well-lit paths until you're stronger.
Speak to the instructors — they always need capable hands.

111.name: Wind Wraith
111.description: A translucent figure made of swirling air. It moans softly.

112.name: Animated Tome
112.description: A thick book that floats in the air, its pages fluttering with malice.

113.name: Blood Slime
113.description: A quivering mass of crimson ooze that absorbs everything it touches.

115.name: Tower Champion
115.description: A battle-scarred warrior in dented plate armor. The final test.

120.name: Instructor Kael
120.description: A grizzled warrior with scars across both arms. He watches newcomers with a knowing eye.

dialogue.text: You've done well to reach the summit. The real challenges lie beyond the gateways.
Remember: power comes from fighting, not from hiding. Seek worthy opponents.
The Bulletin Board always has work. Quest Points buy useful things at the Quest Shop.

sayResponses.text: A marble? I've heard whispers of something rolling through the lower tunnels. It left a trail of destruction.
Power comes from worthy opponents. Seek creatures near your own strength for the best growth.
Beyond the tower lies the Shattered Crown to the east, and the Neon Sprawl further south. Both are more dangerous than here.
Your specialization defines your path. If you want to change, seek the Respec Token from the Quest Shop.
The statues in the lower hall hold a secret. Align them correctly and the way forward opens.
Never fight something more than twice your power. You'll gain nothing but a quick death.

121.name: Quartermaster Pip
121.description: A small, energetic gnome-like figure with oversized spectacles and ink-stained fingers.

dialogue.text: Welcome to the Quest Shop! Everything here costs Quest Points.
Complete quests at the Bulletin Board to earn QP. The harder the quest, the better the reward!
I've got weapons, armor, potions, and a few... special items.

sayResponses.text: Something crashed through the storeroom last week. Left a perfectly round hole in the wall.
Complete quests to earn Quest Points. The harder the quest, the more QP you'll get. First completions pay double!
The Respec Token costs 50 QP. It lets you choose a new specialization while keeping your old abilities.
The Treasure Map reveals hidden rooms in your current zone. Very useful for finding secrets!

1200.name: Aldric the Distraught Wizard
1200.description: A tall, thin man in singed robes paces the ruins of his tower. His hair stands at wild angles, and his eyes dart between the destruction around him and the sheaf of notes clutched in his trembling hands. He mutters calculations under his breath, occasionally stopping to stare at the holes in his walls with a mixture of terror and academic fascination.

sayResponses.text: That... THING. It came through my tower like a cannonball. Decades of research, scattered! I'm still picking up the pieces.
My tower stood for two hundred years before that cursed sphere knocked it sideways. I've been trying to rebuild ever since.
If you find any of my scattered notes in the ruins below, I'd be grateful. They're bound in blue leather.
Magic is just understanding the rules and bending them. The marble... it doesn't bend rules. It breaks them.
Whatever you do, don't try to stop the marble by force. It absorbs energy. The more you hit it, the stronger it gets.

8020.name: Gravity Chamber Technician
8020.description: A wiry technician in a lab coat, surrounded by floating equipment modules.

dialogue.greeting: Need supplies for your training? I've got the good stuff.

sayResponses.text: Our gravity sensors went haywire when that thing passed through. It has its own gravitational field. Impossible, but the data doesn't lie.
The chamber amplifies gravitational force. Training here builds Vigor and Grit faster than anywhere else.
We're pushing the boundaries of physics here. The chamber can simulate up to 50x normal gravity.
Don't push past your limits in the chamber. I've seen people crushed by their own ambition.

9010.name: Spectral Vendor
9010.description: A translucent figure that flickers between planes, its wares hovering in mid-air.

dialogue.greeting: Even the dead need supplies... browse freely, traveler.

sayResponses.buy: I trade in memories and echoes. Gold works too, if you prefer the mundane.
sayResponses.sell: Bring me artifacts from the living world. They hold great value here.
sayResponses.afterlife: Commerce persists even in death. Some habits are eternal.
sayResponses.marble: I have seen it pass through the veil between life and death. It belongs to neither realm.

8099.name: Gravity Core Sentinel
8099.description: A towering construct of folded spacetime, its body rippling with gravitational distortions. The air around it bends light into prismatic halos.

dialogue.telegraph: The Sentinel compresses space around its fist...

sayResponses.facility: This facility operates at 99.7% efficiency. Anomalies are being contained.
sayResponses.gravity: Gravitational flux detected in sectors 3 through 7. Exercise caution.
sayResponses.threat: Current threat level: ELEVATED. Unknown spherical object detected on long-range sensors.
sayResponses.marble: OBJECT ANALYSIS: Mass variable. Velocity variable. Gravitational signature: IMPOSSIBLE. Recommend avoidance.

9099.name: The Hollow King
9099.description: A skeletal monarch wreathed in pale fire, seated on a throne of petrified screams. Its crown pulses with the memories of a thousand forgotten worlds.

dialogue.telegraph: The Hollow King raises his scepter, drawing power from the void...

50.name: Old Gregor
50.description: A weathered man in faded robes who seems to know more than he lets on.
50.dialogue: Welcome, traveler. This hall has seen many pass through. Few return.

sayResponses.help: Type 'look' to see your surroundings, 'go' to move, and 'attack' to fight. Simple enough.
sayResponses.marble: A marble? I've heard whispers of something rolling through the tunnels below. Couldn't say more.
sayResponses.training: The tower to the east will test your mettle. Start at the bottom and work your way up.
sayResponses.rumors: They say the bazaar merchants have seen strange things. Talk to them if you dare.

51.name: Sister Mara
51.description: A calm woman in white robes, her hands glowing faintly with restorative energy.
51.dialogue: Rest here, traveler. Your wounds will mend in time.

sayResponses.heal: I can ease your pain, but true strength comes from within. Rest and recover.
sayResponses.death: Death is not the end here. You will return, weakened but wiser.
sayResponses.help: If you fall in battle, you will wake here. The weakness fades with time.
sayResponses.marble: Something passed through here once. Left a mark on the stones. I cleaned it, but the stain remains.

52.name: Hargrim the Smith
52.description: A broad-shouldered dwarf hammering at a glowing blade. Sparks fly with each strike.
52.dialogue: Need something forged? I work with what I have. Browse if you like.

sayResponses.buy: Take a look at what I've got. Type 'buy' to purchase.
sayResponses.forge: I've been smithing since before this tower stood. Every blade tells a story.
sayResponses.armor: Good armor saves lives. Bad armor just delays the inevitable.
sayResponses.rumors: The tower guardian on the top floor? Nasty piece of work. Bring a good weapon.

53.name: Zara the Peddler
53.description: A quick-eyed woman with a cart overflowing with trinkets and oddities.
53.dialogue: Looking to buy? I've got a bit of everything. Mostly junk, but useful junk.

sayResponses.buy: Browse my wares. Everything has a price, and most of it is reasonable.
sayResponses.sell: I'll take what you don't need. Fair prices, more or less.
sayResponses.rumors: Word is something crashed through the eastern zones. Left a trail of destruction.
sayResponses.marble: A marble? Like a toy? No... wait. Someone mentioned something like that. Rolled right through the bazaar one night.

54.name: Finn the Bookkeeper
54.description: A thin man with spectacles perched on his nose, surrounded by ledgers.
54.dialogue: I keep records of everything that passes through. Everything.

sayResponses.records: Every traveler, every trade, every death. It's all in the books.
sayResponses.help: Need directions? The tower is east, the bazaar is here, and danger is everywhere else.
sayResponses.marble: In my records... yes. An anomalous entry. Something moved through here at impossible speed. No mass, no sound. Just... gone.
sayResponses.quest: Check the bulletin board to the north. Jobs posted daily.

1050.name: Barkeep Roderick
1050.description: A burly man polishing a mug behind a stained oak counter. The inn smells of ale and woodsmoke.
1050.dialogue: What'll it be? Ale's cheap, information costs more.

sayResponses.ale: One gold gets you a mug. Two gets you the good stuff.
sayResponses.rumors: The bandits to the north have been getting bolder. Their leader has some kind of enchanted blade.
sayResponses.inn: Rooms upstairs if you need rest. Safe enough, long as you don't mind the rats.
sayResponses.marble: Something smashed through my wall last month. Round. Fast. Fixed the wall, but the dent in the floor won't come out.
sayResponses.castle: The king hasn't been seen in weeks. Guards are nervous. Something's wrong up there.

1051.name: Elara the Alchemist
1051.description: A young woman surrounded by bubbling flasks and dried herbs. Her eyes are slightly different colors.
1051.dialogue: Potions, salves, and the occasional explosive. What do you need?

sayResponses.buy: I have healing draughts, focus tonics, and a few... experimental mixtures.
sayResponses.potions: Healing potions restore your body. Focus tonics sharpen your mind. Simple as that.
sayResponses.experiment: I'm working on something new. A potion that lets you see through walls. Not ready yet.
sayResponses.marble: I detected a massive energy signature pass through here. My instruments went haywire. Whatever it was, it wasn't natural.

1052.name: Market Crier
1052.description: A loud man in a colorful vest, shouting about daily deals to anyone who will listen.
1052.dialogue: FRESH GOODS! BEST PRICES! Step right up!

sayResponses.deals: The alchemist has potions on sale. The smith is offering blade sharpening for half price!
sayResponses.news: The castle guards doubled their patrols. Something spooked them good.
sayResponses.rumors: I heard the dwarven ruins to the south have treasure. Also death. Mostly death.
sayResponses.marble: You're not the first to ask about that. Something rolled through market street at dawn. Knocked over three carts.

1053.name: Priestess Solara
1053.description: A serene woman in golden robes, standing before a sunlit altar. Light seems to bend toward her.
1053.dialogue: The dawn brings renewal. May its light guide your path.

sayResponses.blessing: I can offer prayers for your safety, but the gods help those who help themselves.
sayResponses.temple: This temple has stood for a thousand years. It will stand a thousand more.
sayResponses.undead: The graveyard to the east is restless. The dead do not sleep easily here.
sayResponses.marble: I have seen it in visions. A sphere of terrible purpose, rolling through the world, gathering power. It must be stopped.
sayResponses.heal: Rest here and your wounds will close. The dawn's light mends all.

1054.name: One-Eyed Jack
1054.description: A scarred man nursing a drink in the corner. His one good eye misses nothing.
1054.dialogue: You look like trouble. Good. I like trouble.

sayResponses.work: I might have a job for someone who doesn't ask too many questions.
sayResponses.bandits: The camp to the north? I used to run with them. Left when their leader went mad.
sayResponses.rumors: The castle armory has a blade that can cut through anything. Getting to it is the hard part.
sayResponses.marble: I saw it. Years ago. Rolling through the forest at night. Thought I was drunk. Maybe I was. But it was real.
sayResponses.fight: You want to test yourself? The arena in the castle courtyard is always looking for fresh meat.

1055.name: Gate Sergeant Brynn
1055.description: A stern woman in dented plate armor, watching the road with practiced vigilance.
1055.dialogue: State your business. The south road is dangerous.

sayResponses.south: Dwarven ruins that way. Undead, traps, and worse. Don't go alone.
sayResponses.guard: I've held this gate for twelve years. Nothing gets through without my say-so.
sayResponses.castle: The king's orders are clear. No one enters the castle without authorization.
sayResponses.rumors: Something hit the south wall last week. Left a perfectly round hole. Engineers can't explain it.

1056.name: Chamberlain Aldous
1056.description: A thin man in fine but dusty clothes, wringing his hands nervously.
1056.dialogue: The king is... indisposed. State your business quickly.

sayResponses.king: His majesty has not been well. The physicians are baffled. Please, do not press further.
sayResponses.castle: The great hall was once full of life. Now it echoes with silence.
sayResponses.help: If you could clear the undead from the graveyard, the king might grant you an audience.
sayResponses.marble: The king's illness began the night something crashed through the east tower. Coincidence? I think not.

1057.name: Master-at-Arms Voss
1057.description: A grizzled veteran surrounded by racks of weapons. Every blade is perfectly maintained.
1057.dialogue: The armory is open to those who've earned it. What do you need?

sayResponses.buy: I sell to warriors, not tourists. But your gold is good enough.
sayResponses.weapons: Blades, maces, bows. Each has its purpose. Choose wisely.
sayResponses.training: I can show you a few tricks if you've got the time. Practice makes perfect.
sayResponses.castle: The guards are on edge. Something in the lower levels has them spooked.

1058.name: Sage Meridian
1058.description: An elderly figure hunched over ancient texts, muttering to themselves.
1058.dialogue: Hmm? Oh, a visitor. Don't touch anything. These texts are older than this castle.

sayResponses.books: History, magic theory, cartography. All here, all fragile. Handle with care.
sayResponses.magic: Magic is simply will made manifest. The stronger the will, the stronger the effect.
sayResponses.marble: I've found references in three separate texts. An object of immense kinetic potential. It predates recorded history.
sayResponses.ruins: The ancient ruins south of here were built by a civilization that understood forces we've forgotten.
sayResponses.research: I'm close to a breakthrough. Something about resonance frequencies and spherical motion...

1141.name: Prisoner Giles
1141.description: A haggard man chained to the wall, barely conscious but still aware.
1141.dialogue: You... you're not one of them. Please, help me.

sayResponses.help: The key is with the guard captain. Deeper in the dungeon. If you find it...
sayResponses.dungeon: They brought me here weeks ago. The dwarven ruins below are crawling with undead.
sayResponses.escape: There's a passage behind the forge. The dwarves built escape routes everywhere.
sayResponses.rumors: I heard something rolling through the tunnels at night. The guards are terrified of it.

1142.name: Ghost of Forgemaster Durin
1142.description: A translucent dwarf standing before the cold forge, forever reaching for his hammer.
1142.dialogue: The forge... it must burn again. The runes... they must be relit...

sayResponses.forge: This forge once crafted weapons that could split mountains. Now it is cold and dead.
sayResponses.dwarves: My people fell to darkness. Something came through. Fast. Unstoppable. It cracked the foundation.
sayResponses.runes: The runes of power are scattered through these halls. Find them, and the forge may live again.
sayResponses.marble: I SAW IT. The sphere of ruin. It tore through our deepest vault like paper. We never recovered.

2050.name: Reception AI
2050.description: A holographic woman behind a desk, her smile frozen in corporate perfection.
2050.dialogue: Welcome to MegaCorp Tower. How may I direct your inquiry?

sayResponses.megacorp: MegaCorp Industries: Building tomorrow, today. Our CEO is currently unavailable.
sayResponses.elevator: Floors 1-30 are public access. Higher floors require clearance.
sayResponses.help: I can provide directions, corporate history, or emergency services. Which do you prefer?
sayResponses.marble: I have no record of that object in our database. However, security footage from last month shows an anomaly on floor 47.

2051.name: Noodle Chef Tanaka
2051.description: A sweating man working three woks simultaneously, flames leaping with each toss.
2051.dialogue: Sit! Eat! Best noodles on floor 47. Maybe all of Neo-City.

sayResponses.food: Ramen, udon, yakisoba. All synthetic protein, but I make it taste real.
sayResponses.rumors: The underground market has black-market chrome. Dangerous stuff, but powerful.
sayResponses.megacorp: They own everything. Even this noodle bar. I just rent the space.
sayResponses.marble: My security camera caught something last week. Round, fast, smashed through the window and out the other side. Insurance won't cover it.

2052.name: Chrome Dealer Vex
2052.description: A woman with more metal than skin, her eyes cycling through colors as she scans you.
2052.dialogue: Looking for upgrades? I've got the best chrome this side of the firewall.

sayResponses.buy: Implants, boosters, neural links. All top quality. Mostly.
sayResponses.chrome: Cybernetics aren't just fashion. They're survival. The streets eat the unaugmented.
sayResponses.underground: The real market is below. Way below. But you need connections to get in.
sayResponses.marble: A client mentioned something. An object that moves on its own. Said it fried every sensor it passed. Interesting.

2053.name: Street Prophet
2053.description: A man covered in glowing tattoos, standing at the crossroads muttering prophecies.
2053.dialogue: The convergence approaches. All paths lead to the sphere.

sayResponses.prophecy: The sphere rolls through all worlds. It gathers what it needs. Soon it will be complete.
sayResponses.crossroads: Every choice leads somewhere. Most lead to death. Choose wisely.
sayResponses.marble: I have SEEN it. In my visions. A perfect sphere of absolute purpose. It does not think. It does not feel. It simply IS.
sayResponses.help: Go north for the corporate sector. South for the underground. East for the junkyard. West for the slums.

2054.name: Junkyard Boss Krill
2054.description: A massive man made mostly of salvaged parts, sitting on a throne of scrap metal.
2054.dialogue: This is MY junkyard. You want to scavenge, you pay the toll.

sayResponses.toll: Ten gold gets you an hour. Find what you can carry. Touch my personal stash and I break you.
sayResponses.scrap: Everything here was something once. Drones, bots, vehicles. All broken. All useful.
sayResponses.underground: The tunnels under the junk lead to the underground market. If you can find the entrance.
sayResponses.marble: Something rolled through here three days ago. Crushed a stack of cars flat. Left a perfect tunnel through the scrap.

2055.name: The Broker
2055.description: A figure in a hooded coat, face hidden behind a featureless mask. Their voice is synthesized.
2055.dialogue: You found the market. Good. Keep your voice down and your credits ready.

sayResponses.buy: I deal in things that don't officially exist. Weapons, data, identities.
sayResponses.sell: I'll take anything valuable. No questions asked. No receipts given.
sayResponses.information: Information is my real trade. Ask the right question and I might have an answer.
sayResponses.marble: That object has passed through seventeen known dimensions. I have the tracking data. It's not cheap.
sayResponses.underground: This market exists because MegaCorp can't reach here. Keep it that way.

2056.name: Doc Patches
2056.description: A woman in a bloodstained lab coat, her cybernetic hands twitching with precision.
2056.dialogue: Bullet holes, blade wounds, or bad chrome? I fix it all. No insurance needed.

sayResponses.heal: Sit down, shut up, and let me work. You'll be fine in an hour.
sayResponses.chrome: I can install implants too. Cheaper than the dealer, but... less warranty.
sayResponses.clinic: This clinic serves the underground. MegaCorp doesn't know it exists. Keep it that way.
sayResponses.rumors: A patient came in last week with burns in a perfect circle. Said something rolled over him. Never seen anything like it.

2057.name: Mama Chen
2057.description: An old woman selling synthetic vegetables from a rickety stall. Her eyes are sharp despite her age.
2057.dialogue: Fresh produce! Well, fresh-ish. Better than the protein bars.

sayResponses.food: Tomatoes, peppers, mushrooms. All grown in my hydro-garden. Real organic.
sayResponses.shantytown: We built this place from nothing. MegaCorp tried to bulldoze us twice. We rebuilt.
sayResponses.rumors: The children say they saw a ball of light in the tunnels. I told them to stay away.
sayResponses.marble: My grandmother told stories of a rolling stone that never stopped. I thought it was a fairy tale.

3050.name: Building Super
3050.description: A grumpy man in overalls, jangling a ring of keys.
3050.dialogue: Third floor, office 3B. That's the PI. Don't track mud on my floors.

sayResponses.office: The detective upstairs? Good at finding things. Bad at paying rent.
sayResponses.building: Built in '42. Survived two fires and a flood. Tough old girl.
sayResponses.rumors: Something smashed through the basement wall last month. Round hole. Perfect circle. Cops couldn't explain it.

3051.name: Detective Morrison
3051.description: A tired man in a rumpled suit, cigarette smoke curling around his fedora. Files cover every surface.
3051.dialogue: Another case? Pull up a chair. I charge by the hour.

sayResponses.case: Missing persons, stolen goods, cheating spouses. I handle it all.
sayResponses.hire: Fifty gold retainer, plus expenses. I'm worth it.
sayResponses.docks: The docks are mob territory. The Syndicate runs everything south of the bridge.
sayResponses.marble: A client hired me to track something. Round, fast, leaves destruction in its wake. Trail went cold at the cemetery.
sayResponses.chinatown: Good food, bad people. The triads run that neighborhood. Tread carefully.

3052.name: Old Man Wei
3052.description: An ancient man sitting behind a counter of dried herbs and strange artifacts.
3052.dialogue: Welcome, welcome. You seek something? Everyone who comes here seeks something.

sayResponses.buy: Herbs, charms, remedies. Ancient wisdom for modern problems.
sayResponses.chinatown: My family has been here for five generations. We remember what others forget.
sayResponses.temple: The temple next door holds secrets. The monks there know things about the old world.
sayResponses.marble: In our tradition, we call it the Wandering Stone. It has passed through this world many times before.

3053.name: Monk Liang
3053.description: A bald man in saffron robes, sitting in perfect stillness before a smoking incense burner.
3053.dialogue: Stillness reveals truth. Sit, if you wish.

sayResponses.meditate: Close your eyes. Breathe. The answers you seek are already within you.
sayResponses.temple: This temple predates the city. It was here when the land was wild.
sayResponses.marble: We have records of the Sphere in our oldest scrolls. It moves in cycles. This cycle is nearly complete.
sayResponses.wisdom: Strength without wisdom is a blade without a handle. It cuts the wielder.

3054.name: Dockmaster Hank
3054.description: A weathered man with a clipboard, shouting orders at longshoremen.
3054.dialogue: You ain't on my manifest. State your business or get off my docks.

sayResponses.docks: Cargo in, cargo out. That's all I care about. What's in the crates ain't my problem.
sayResponses.ships: Three ships in port today. The Maiden's Tear, the Iron Wake, and one with no name. Suspicious.
sayResponses.syndicate: I don't know nothing about no syndicate. And neither do you, if you're smart.
sayResponses.rumors: A crate came in last week. Heavy. Round. Nobody ordered it. It was gone by morning.

3055.name: Fishmonger Pete
3055.description: A man in a stained apron, gutting fish with mechanical efficiency.
3055.dialogue: Fresh catch! Well, fresh-ish. The harbor ain't what it used to be.

sayResponses.fish: Cod, mackerel, and whatever that thing is. Five gold a pound.
sayResponses.docks: I've worked these docks thirty years. Seen things. Heard things. Mostly I keep quiet.
sayResponses.rumors: The warehouse at the end of the row? Don't go there at night. The Syndicate uses it.
sayResponses.marble: I was fishing at dawn when something shot out of the water. Round. Fast. Skipped across the harbor like a stone.

4050.name: Quartermaster Hayes
4050.description: A no-nonsense woman behind a cage of weapons and supplies.
4050.dialogue: Requisition form or gold. Either works. What do you need?

sayResponses.buy: Weapons, ammo, rations. Standard military issue. Nothing fancy, but it works.
sayResponses.armory: Everything here is accounted for. Don't even think about stealing.
sayResponses.war: We've been fighting for three years. Nobody remembers what started it anymore.
sayResponses.rumors: Something hit the eastern trench last week. Not a shell. Something round. Left a perfect tunnel.

4051.name: Sergeant Major Cole
4051.description: A scarred man sitting on a bunk, cleaning his rifle with practiced hands.
4051.dialogue: New recruit? You look green. Try not to die on your first patrol.

sayResponses.patrol: North perimeter at dawn, east at noon, south at dusk. Miss your shift and I'll have your hide.
sayResponses.war: The enemy is dug in deep. We push, they push back. Stalemate for months.
sayResponses.training: Hit the range. Practice until your hands bleed. Then practice more.
sayResponses.rumors: Something crossed no-man's-land last night. Set off every mine. Didn't slow down.

4052.name: Cook Ramirez
4052.description: A heavyset man stirring a massive pot of something that might be stew.
4052.dialogue: Chow's on. Eat it or don't. Next meal's in six hours.

sayResponses.food: It's nutritious. That's the best I can say. Taste is a luxury we can't afford.
sayResponses.mess: Three meals a day, every day, for two hundred soldiers. I don't sleep much.
sayResponses.rumors: The refugees from the south camp say something destroyed their village. Not bombs. Something else.
sayResponses.morale: Morale is low. We need a win. Any win.

4053.name: Refugee Elder Miriam
4053.description: An old woman wrapped in blankets, eyes hollow but determined.
4053.dialogue: We came from the south. There is nothing left there.

sayResponses.south: Our village was destroyed in a single night. Not by soldiers. By something... round.
sayResponses.refugees: Forty of us made it. The rest... I don't know.
sayResponses.help: We need food, medicine, and safety. Can you help?
sayResponses.marble: I saw it with my own eyes. A sphere of terrible power. It rolled through our homes like they were paper.

4054.name: Field Medic Torres
4054.description: A young woman with blood on her hands, working frantically on a wounded soldier.
4054.dialogue: If you're not bleeding, get out. If you are, sit down.

sayResponses.heal: I'll patch you up. Don't expect miracles. I'm a medic, not a wizard.
sayResponses.wounded: We get a dozen casualties a day. I do what I can.
sayResponses.camp: The refugees need more help than I can give. We need supplies.
sayResponses.rumors: A soldier came in with burns in a perfect circle. Said something rolled over his foxhole.

4055.name: Arms Dealer Vasquez
4055.description: A man in a leather jacket, surrounded by crates of weapons from a dozen different armies.
4055.dialogue: No flags, no loyalties. Just business. What are you buying?

sayResponses.buy: Rifles, grenades, armor. All surplus. All functional. Mostly.
sayResponses.sell: I'll take anything that shoots. Fair prices for fair goods.
sayResponses.war: War is good for business. Peace is bad for business. I prefer war.
sayResponses.marble: A client wanted me to find a weapon that could stop a sphere. I told him no weapon can stop what doesn't think.

5050.name: The Librarian
5050.description: A being of pure light, hovering between shelves of crystallized knowledge.
5050.dialogue: Knowledge persists even when reality fractures. Ask, and I may answer.

sayResponses.knowledge: Each crystal contains a lifetime of learning. Handle them carefully.
sayResponses.fracture: This realm shattered when the Sphere passed through. Reality could not contain its momentum.
sayResponses.marble: The Sphere has passed through this shard seventeen times. Each passage fractures reality further.
sayResponses.bridge: The vine bridges connect the shards. They grow where reality is thinnest.

5051.name: Shard Merchant Opal
5051.description: A crystalline humanoid whose body refracts light into rainbows. Their voice chimes like glass.
5051.dialogue: Trade in fragments of reality. Each shard holds value beyond gold.

sayResponses.buy: I deal in essence, not objects. But gold translates well enough.
sayResponses.sell: Bring me curiosities from other shards. I pay well for the unusual.
sayResponses.marketplace: This shard stabilized around commerce. Even fractured reality needs an economy.
sayResponses.marble: The Sphere's passage created these shards. In a way, it created me. I owe it my existence.

5052.name: Forge Spirit
5052.description: A being of molten metal and flame, hammering at an anvil that floats in empty space.
5052.dialogue: The forge burns eternal. Bring materials and I will shape them.

sayResponses.forge: I craft from the essence of shattered reality. Each weapon is unique.
sayResponses.buy: Bring gold and I will arm you. My creations are without equal.
sayResponses.shard: This shard remembers being a mountain. The forge remembers being its heart.
sayResponses.marble: It passed through here like a meteor. The heat of its passage ignited my forge. I have burned ever since.

6050.name: Roman Announcer
6050.description: A man in a toga, his voice trained to carry across the colosseum.
6050.dialogue: Welcome to the arena! Today's matches promise blood and glory!

sayResponses.arena: Gladiators fight for honor, freedom, or gold. Which drives you?
sayResponses.fights: The champion is undefeated. Many have tried. All have fallen.
sayResponses.rome: The Empire is eternal. Or so they tell us.
sayResponses.marble: During last week's match, something rolled across the arena floor. Killed two gladiators. The crowd thought it was part of the show.

6051.name: Egyptian Merchant Khufu
6051.description: A man in white linen, his stall covered in golden trinkets and papyrus scrolls.
6051.dialogue: Treasures of the pharaohs! Genuine artifacts! Mostly genuine.

sayResponses.buy: Amulets, scrolls, sacred oils. All blessed by the priests of Ra.
sayResponses.temple: The Temple of Ra stands to the north. The priests there hold great power.
sayResponses.egypt: The Nile provides. The pharaoh protects. The gods watch.
sayResponses.marble: The priests speak of a sacred sphere that rolls through the underworld. They fear it.

6052.name: High Priest Amenhotep
6052.description: A tall man with a golden headdress, his eyes lined with kohl. Power radiates from him.
6052.dialogue: You stand in the house of Ra. Show respect.

sayResponses.ra: Ra is the sun. The sun is life. All power flows from his light.
sayResponses.blessing: Kneel and I may grant you Ra's favor. Stand and you receive nothing.
sayResponses.marble: The sacred texts speak of the Rolling Darkness. It devours the light of Ra wherever it passes. We have prepared wards.
sayResponses.pharaoh: The pharaoh rests in his tomb. His spirit watches over Egypt still.

6053.name: Viking Shipwright Bjorn
6053.description: A massive man with a braided beard, carving a dragon prow from a single log.
6053.dialogue: A good ship is worth more than gold. She carries you to glory or Valhalla.

sayResponses.ships: I build longships. Fastest on the water. Strong enough for any storm.
sayResponses.docks: Three ships ready to sail. We raid at dawn.
sayResponses.viking: We are the wolves of the sea. Fear us or join us.
sayResponses.marble: Something punched through the hull of my best ship. Round hole. Perfect circle. The sea rushed in. We barely saved her.

6054.name: Skald Ingrid
6054.description: A woman with wild red hair, singing tales of battle over a horn of mead.
6054.dialogue: Sit! Drink! Let me sing you the saga of Ragnar the Bold!

sayResponses.saga: Every warrior deserves a saga. Fight well and I will compose yours.
sayResponses.mead: The mead flows freely in the hall. Drink deep, for tomorrow we may die.
sayResponses.odin: The All-Father watches from his throne. He chooses who lives and who falls.
sayResponses.marble: In the old songs, they speak of Odin's Eye -- a sphere that rolls between worlds. Perhaps it is the same.

6055.name: Viking Smith Thorvald
6055.description: A soot-covered man hammering a blade on a rune-carved anvil.
6055.dialogue: Iron and fire. That's all a warrior needs. And maybe a good axe.

sayResponses.buy: Axes, swords, shields. All forged with runes of power.
sayResponses.forge: My anvil was blessed by Thor himself. Or so my grandfather claimed.
sayResponses.runes: The runes hold power. Carve them right and a blade cuts twice as deep.
sayResponses.marble: Something struck my anvil in the night. Left a dent I cannot hammer out. The metal around it hums.

6056.name: Aztec Trader Itzel
6056.description: A woman in feathered garments, her stall displaying obsidian blades and jade ornaments.
6056.dialogue: The gods demand tribute. Perhaps you have something worthy?

sayResponses.buy: Obsidian blades, jade amulets, feathered armor. All sacred. All deadly.
sayResponses.temple: The temple summit is where the priests commune with the gods. Do not go uninvited.
sayResponses.gods: Quetzalcoatl watches. Huitzilopochtli hungers. Appease them or suffer.
sayResponses.marble: The priests call it the Heart of Tezcatlipoca. A sphere of obsidian that rolls through the world, bringing change.

6057.name: Sheriff Hawkins
6057.description: A lean man with a star pinned to his vest, a revolver on each hip.
6057.dialogue: I keep the peace in this town. Break it and we'll have words.

sayResponses.town: Small place. Honest folk, mostly. The trouble comes from outside.
sayResponses.outlaws: Bandits to the east. Been raiding the supply wagons. I need deputies.
sayResponses.law: My law is simple. Don't steal. Don't kill. Don't cause trouble.
sayResponses.marble: Something rolled through main street last Tuesday. Spooked every horse in town. Left a furrow in the dirt a foot deep.

6058.name: Stablehand Eli
6058.description: A young man mucking out stalls, whistling tunelessly.
6058.dialogue: Need a horse? They're spooked today. Something's got 'em nervous.

sayResponses.horses: We got three available. The bay is fast, the roan is strong, the paint is smart.
sayResponses.stable: I keep 'em fed and brushed. They keep me employed. Fair trade.
sayResponses.spooked: Started last week. Something came through at night. Horses won't go near the east road now.
sayResponses.marble: I didn't see it, but I heard it. Like thunder rolling along the ground. Horses went crazy.

6150.name: Atlantean Merchant Nereus
6150.description: A being with iridescent scales and webbed fingers, displaying wares on a coral counter.
6150.dialogue: Surface dweller. Our goods are superior to anything your world produces.

sayResponses.buy: Coral armor, trident blades, pressure suits. All crafted in the deep.
sayResponses.atlantis: We sank beneath the waves by choice, not catastrophe. The surface was too chaotic.
sayResponses.marble: The Sphere passed through our dome three centuries ago. We repaired the breach, but the memory remains.
sayResponses.poseidon: The temple to the north honors our patron. He protects us still.

6151.name: Atlantean Herald
6151.description: A tall figure in flowing robes of living water, their voice echoing with authority.
6151.dialogue: Welcome to the Central Plaza of Atlantis. Conduct yourself with dignity.

sayResponses.plaza: This is the heart of our city. Commerce, governance, and culture converge here.
sayResponses.rules: Violence is forbidden in the plaza. Violators are expelled to the surface.
sayResponses.atlantis: Our civilization has endured for ten thousand years. We intend to endure ten thousand more.
sayResponses.marble: Our seers track the Sphere's movements. It approaches again. We are prepared this time.

6152.name: Atlantean Archivist
6152.description: A hunched figure surrounded by floating tablets of compressed water, each containing text.
6152.dialogue: The archives contain all knowledge of the deep. What do you seek?

sayResponses.knowledge: Ask a question and I will search the archives. Most answers exist here.
sayResponses.history: Atlantis was founded when the first people chose the sea over the land. We never looked back.
sayResponses.marble: I have seventeen entries regarding the Sphere. Its trajectory is predictable. Its purpose is not.
sayResponses.surface: The surface world is chaotic and brief. We observe but do not interfere. Usually.

6153.name: Golden Guardian
6153.description: A statue of pure gold that moves with fluid grace. Its eyes burn with ancient fire.
