6153.dialogue: Only the worthy may enter El Dorado. Prove your worth or turn back.

sayResponses.worth: Bring gold equal to your weight. Or defeat me in single combat. Your choice.
sayResponses.eldorado: The city of gold has stood since before memory. Its treasures are beyond counting.
sayResponses.marble: The Sphere came here once. It took nothing. Left nothing. Simply passed through. Even gold could not tempt it.
sayResponses.treasure: The gold here is not mere metal. It is crystallized sunlight. It holds power.

7050.name: Undercity Fence
7050.description: A hunched figure in the shadows, eyes gleaming with avarice.
7050.dialogue: You found the market. Good. Everything here fell off a cart. Understand?

sayResponses.buy: Weapons, potions, information. All at reasonable prices. No questions.
sayResponses.sell: I'll take anything of value. The more questionable its origin, the better the price.
sayResponses.undercity: This place exists because the surface doesn't want us. Their loss.
sayResponses.marble: Something rolled through the tunnels last month. Collapsed two passages. The diggers are still clearing rubble.

8100.name: Archivist Unit 7
8100.description: A floating mechanical sphere covered in lenses and data ports. It hums with stored information.
8100.dialogue: QUERY RECEIVED. STATE YOUR INFORMATION REQUEST.

sayResponses.records: This facility contains 47,000 years of gravitational research data. Specify your query.
sayResponses.gravity: Gravity is not a force. It is a curvature of spacetime. This facility manipulates that curvature.
sayResponses.marble: OBJECT DESIGNATION: UNKNOWN SPHERE. Gravitational signature: anomalous. Mass: variable. Trajectory: unpredictable. THREAT LEVEL: MAXIMUM.
sayResponses.facility: This facility was constructed to study and contain gravitational anomalies. It has failed at the latter.

9100.name: Gatekeeper Anubis
9100.description: A towering figure with the head of a jackal, holding golden scales in one hand.
9100.dialogue: Your heart will be weighed. Your deeds will be measured. Enter.

sayResponses.judgment: All souls are judged. The worthy pass on. The unworthy are consumed.
sayResponses.afterlife: Beyond these gates lie the realms of the dead. Heroes, villains, and all between.
sayResponses.marble: The Sphere does not belong here. It is not alive, not dead. It simply passes through, and we cannot stop it.
sayResponses.return: The living may visit, but they may not stay. Your time here is limited.

9101.name: Spirit of Valor
9101.description: A luminous warrior in ancient armor, their form flickering between a dozen different faces.
9101.dialogue: Welcome, living one. The heroes rest here. Their stories echo eternally.

sayResponses.heroes: Every great warrior who ever lived rests in this hall. Their deeds are remembered.
sayResponses.training: Even in death, we train. The spirit grows stronger without the body's limits.
sayResponses.marble: Some heroes here fell to the Sphere. They bear no shame. Nothing could have stopped it.
sayResponses.valor: True valor is not the absence of fear. It is action in spite of it.

9102.name: Judge of Souls
9102.description: A robed figure whose face is hidden behind a featureless golden mask. They radiate absolute authority.
9102.dialogue: Step forward. Your deeds will be read aloud. Do not lie. I will know.

sayResponses.judgment: I weigh every action. Every choice. Every moment of cowardice and courage.
sayResponses.mercy: Mercy is earned, not given. Show me why you deserve it.
sayResponses.marble: The Sphere has no soul to judge. It is beyond my authority. This troubles me greatly.
sayResponses.pass: If you are judged worthy, you may pass deeper into the afterlife. If not... you will not enjoy what follows.

1813.name: Blade Monk Takeshi
1813.description: A weathered monk in simple robes, his hands calloused from decades of sword practice. He moves with an economy of motion that suggests absolute mastery.

dialogue.text: The sword is not a weapon. It is an extension of will.

3015.name: Maestro Beaumont
3015.description: A silver-haired gentleman in an immaculate white suit, a rapier resting against his chair. His posture is perfect, his smile dangerous.

dialogue.text: Every parry is an invitation. Every riposte, an acceptance.

2018.name: Holo-Sensei
2018.description: A flickering holographic figure in samurai armor, projected from a device bolted to the counter. Despite being intangible, the blade it holds leaves scorch marks on the air.

dialogue.text: Energy follows intent. The beam blade is thought made manifest.

1814.name: Grandmaster Yun
1814.description: An impossibly old figure seated in perfect stillness. Their hands rest on their knees, each knuckle a weapon unto itself. The air around them feels denser.

dialogue.text: The fist is the first weapon. The last weapon. The only weapon you will never lose.

8021.name: Void Adept Kira
8021.description: A figure floating cross-legged above the ground, surrounded by a faint distortion in space. Their eyes are closed, but you sense they are acutely aware of everything.

dialogue.text: Between atoms, there is void. Learn to strike there, and nothing can resist you.

4015.name: Siege Engineer Volkov
4015.description: A massive figure in blast-scarred armor, idly spinning a war hammer that would take two normal people to lift. Craters in the floor mark where they practice.

dialogue.text: Armor is a suggestion. With enough force, everything breaks.

6015.name: Terracotta General
6015.description: A figure of fired clay given impossible life. It stands at attention with a halberd, its movements precise and mechanical yet devastatingly effective.

dialogue.text: Reach is control. Control is victory. The polearm commands the battlefield.

1815.name: Archery Master Hana
1815.description: A serene figure with a longbow taller than themselves. They stand motionless, arrow nocked, watching something invisible in the distance with absolute patience.

dialogue.text: Release before you think. The arrow knows where it must go.

4016.name: Sniper Instructor Reyes
4016.description: A lean figure in a ghillie suit, cleaning a rifle with methodical precision. Their eyes never stop scanning, even in conversation. A collection of spent casings forms a neat pyramid nearby.

dialogue.text: One round. One target. Patience is the deadliest weapon in any arsenal.

2019.name: The Archmage (Holographic)
2019.description: A robed figure rendered in blue light, their staff crackling with simulated arcane energy. The hologram is so detailed you can see individual runes shifting on their skin.

dialogue.text: The staff channels. Focus flows through it like water through a riverbed. Let it carry you.

6016.name: Paradox Smith
6016.description: A figure that seems to exist in multiple moments simultaneously. Their weapon shifts form between heartbeats  -  blade, whip, chain, something that has no name.

dialogue.text: Predictability is death. Chaos is life. Let the weapon decide what it wants to be.
